import{useState,useEffect}from'react';/**
 * Animates typing of `text` character by character.
 * Returns the currently-typed string.
 */export default function useTypewriter(text){let speed=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:65;const[displayed,setDisplayed]=useState('');const[index,setIndex]=useState(0);useEffect(()=>{if(index<text.length){const t=setTimeout(()=>{setDisplayed(text.slice(0,index+1));setIndex(i=>i+1);},speed);return()=>clearTimeout(t);}},[index,text,speed]);return displayed;}
